title: Dogfood the rc.2 archive flow in Fabric self-repo and capture evidence
scope: Fabric repo working tree (manual + scripted dogfood validation)
description: Validate rc.2 end-to-end against Fabric's own repo (self-dogfood). Run `fabric init --reapply` to install fabric-archive skill + archive-hint.cjs + Stop-hook configs into .claude/ and .codex/. Manually invoke an MCP client (Claude Code OR direct Node MCP harness) calling fab_extract_knowledge with synthetic input matching a real recent decision from this rc.2 implementation effort. Verify pending entry created at .fabric/knowledge/pending/<type>/<slug>.md (no id frontmatter). Verify events.jsonl gains knowledge_proposed event with correlation_id. Trigger archive-hint.cjs by appending 5+ plan_context events to events.jsonl OR by waiting 24h+ — confirm reminder fires. Capture evidence (file contents, events.jsonl tail, hook stdout) in planning-context.md addendum or dogfood-report.md.

files.change: Markdown report with sections: (1) Setup (commands run: fabric init --reapply, ls outputs proving file presence). (2) MCP tool invocation (input payload, output {pending_path, idempotency_key}). (3) Pending entry contents (cat output of generated .md showing no-id frontmatter). (4) Event ledger trail (events.jsonl tail showing knowledge_proposed entry). (5) Hook trigger (manual events.jsonl seeding to cross 5-plan_context threshold OR 24h fallback simulation, archive-hint.cjs stdout JSON capture). (6) Idempotency check (re-invoke same input, confirm same idempotency_key returned). (7) Issues encountered (any bugs found during dogfood — feed back to TASK-001..006 for fix iterations).

Optional Node script to automate the dogfood flow: spawn Fabric MCP server, send fab_extract_knowledge JSON-RPC request, read events.jsonl, simulate hook trigger by writing 5 plan_context events, run archive-hint.cjs as child process, capture stdout. Useful for repeatability — supplements (does not replace) manual report. Place under scripts/ to keep outside packages/.

implementation: Verify all of TASK-001..006 are merged on main (run `git log --oneline -10`)

From Fabric repo root run `pnpm fabric init --reapply` (or equivalent existing command); verify .claude/skills/fabric-archive/SKILL.md, .claude/hooks/archive-hint.cjs, .claude/settings.json hooks.Stop entry, .codex/skills/fabric-archive/SKILL.md, .codex/hooks/archive-hint.cjs, .codex/hooks.json all present; capture `ls -la` outputs in dogfood-report.md

Construct synthetic FabExtractKnowledgeInput matching a real rc.2 decision (e.g. {source_session:'rc2-impl-2026-05-10', recent_paths:['packages/server/src/services/extract-knowledge.ts'], user_messages_summary:'idempotency key derived from triple not body', type:'decisions', slug:'idempotency-key-triple'}); save as fixture

Invoke MCP tool — option A: from Claude Code interactively via the fabric-archive skill flow; option B: direct Node JSON-RPC harness sending tools/call to fab_extract_knowledge. Capture output {pending_path, idempotency_key}
Cat the generated pending .md file; verify NO `id:` line in frontmatter; verify type/maturity:'draft'/layer:'team'/source_session/created_at all present; capture into dogfood-report.md
Tail events.jsonl; verify knowledge_proposed event with correlation_id matching source_session; capture into dogfood-report.md

Trigger archive-hint.cjs: append 5 synthetic plan_context events to events.jsonl with timestamps after the knowledge_proposed; run `node .claude/hooks/archive-hint.cjs` from project root; capture stdout JSON {decision:'block', reason:string} into dogfood-report.md
Re-invoke fab_extract_knowledge with same input; verify same idempotency_key returned and pending file body augmented (evidence section appended) — capture before/after diff
Commit: `chore(dogfood): rc.2 archive flow self-validation evidence`

reference.pattern: Manual + scripted self-dogfood validation with markdown evidence capture
reference.examples: Existing dogfood evidence in commits a0a47dd (knowledge_language=zh-CN declared) and b9862d9 (13 dogfood entries M3 zh-CN style) shows the precedent: capture concrete file outputs in markdown, no abstract claims. Follow same evidence-density.

criteria: fabric init --reapply on Fabric self-repo succeeds without error and produces all 6 expected files (2 skills + 2 hook scripts + 2 hook configs)
fab_extract_knowledge MCP tool invocation returns valid {pending_path, idempotency_key} response
Generated pending .md has frontmatter WITHOUT `id:` field (verifiable by grep)
events.jsonl gains knowledge_proposed event with correlation_id matching input.source_session
Re-invocation with same input returns same idempotency_key (proves cross-invocation stability)
Re-invoked pending file body has evidence section appended (NOT overwritten)
archive-hint.cjs fires on threshold cross (5 plan_contexts after last knowledge_proposed) and emits valid stdout JSON {decision:'block', reason:string with 'fabric-archive' mention}
All 7 sections of dogfood-report.md filled with concrete evidence (cat outputs, JSON snippets, before/after diffs) — no placeholder TODO markers

rationale.chosen_approach: Manual dogfood with markdown evidence + optional scripted harness for repeatability
alternatives_considered: Pure scripted dogfood — rejected: misses real-world MCP-client UX issues that only surface in interactive Claude Code session
Skip dogfood and trust unit/integration tests — rejected: rc.2 grill-followup explicitly demands self-dogfood evidence per planning convergence
Test against external fixture project — rejected: Fabric self-repo IS the production environment for this iteration
decision_factors: User MEMORY note (memory-capture preference) prefers concrete evidence over abstract claims
Fabric is pre-user (memory:feedback_clean_slate) — self-dogfood IS production validation
Existing precedent: commits a0a47dd / b9862d9 show evidence-rich dogfood report style
rationale.tradeoffs: Manual dogfood is slower than scripted but catches UX issues invisible to unit tests

manual_checks: Visual inspect dogfood-report.md — confirm 7 sections present with concrete evidence
Run `git diff` — confirm only dogfood-report.md (and optional scripts/dogfood-rc2-archive.mjs) staged
Verify pending .md committed to .fabric/knowledge/pending/ as part of dogfood (or alternatively gitignored — decide at execution time per repo convention)
success_metrics: All 8 convergence criteria checked off in dogfood-report.md with evidence quotes
Zero issues found OR all found issues escalated as follow-up tasks (recorded in section 7)
